window.operatingHours: Agent scans the current UTC day. Live-support hours come from project guidelines or project memory.

items.message:
Hey team! 👋

Today's [**Stargazer daily thread**](https://community.outlier.ai/t/daily-thread-07-16/2904771) is up.

Please take a few minutes to read it before tasking today. The topic is **Prompt Quality**, with a reminder about **Bug Injection = fix. New Feature = add. Migration = migrate. Don't mix them.**.

Quick rule: Bug fix language in a New Feature prompt = automatic rejection.



Use the daily thread for blockers, Cursor issues, validation/eval problems, onboarding questions, or task-related doubts 🙌
items.ignoredReason: Manager announcement authored by the configured bot user, not a contributor support request.
